scripts.assets:install: bun run fonts:install && bun run icons:install
scripts.css:build: bun run assets:install && bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/main.css -o assets/styles/style.css
scripts.css:watch: bun run assets:install && bunx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/main.css -o assets/styles/style.css --watch
scripts.dev: bash -c 'bun run css:watch & css=$!; hugo server & hugo=$!; trap "kill $css $hugo 2>/dev/null" EXIT INT TERM; wait -n; exit $?'
